overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, starting in a dense neon-lit garden corridor, ascending stairs, and emerging into an open plaza with futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic ray-traced lighting and heavy atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit garden corridor with dense foliage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow garden path illuminated by cyan neon lights, surrounded by dense wet foliage

entered.detail: thick green bushes and trees lining the left side of the path
thick green bushes and trees lining the right side of the path
tall cylindrical neon light emitting bright cyan illumination
wet cobblestone-style pathway reflecting the neon lights
concrete bench partially visible through foliage on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow garden corridor enclosed by dense vegetation on both sides. The path is paved with wet cobblestones that reflect the cyan neon light pillars ahead. The atmosphere is heavy with rain, and the dense foliage creates a tunnel-like effect blocking most of the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area at base of stairs with utility structures

events.description: exits dense garden corridor into wider area with concrete walls and stairs visible ahead
rain intensity increases with heavier downpour and more visible rain streaks

agents.ego_description: approaching a stairway while passing by NPCs sitting and standing near the concrete walls

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the ground near a concrete wall, one wearing blue and one in purple
person standing near a utility box, illuminated by cyan light

entered.detail: tall concrete wall replacing the foliage on the left side
large dark rectangular utility structure against the wall
wide concrete staircase leading upward with cyan light posts at the top

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up from the dense garden into a transitional area with concrete walls and a visible stairway ahead. Two NPCs sit on the ground to the left while another stands nearby. The rain intensifies as the camera approaches the stairs, with utility boxes and concrete structures replacing the natural foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to upper plaza level

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters open plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing the wet concrete stairs while a female character descends toward the camera

notable_agents.action: woman with short hair and casual clothing walking down the stairs, passing close to the camera

entered.detail: wide wet concrete stairs with visible rain droplets hitting the surface
smooth concrete wall lining the right side of the staircase
open area visible at the top of the stairs with city lights beyond

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by smooth concrete walls, transitioning from the enclosed lower area to an upper plaza. A female NPC descends the stairs passing the camera. The rain continues to fall heavily on the wet concrete steps as the open plaza becomes visible at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with futuristic commercial buildings and a central pagoda structure

events.description: enters open plaza with yellow illuminated barriers and distant city lights visible
approaching the traditional-futuristic pagoda structure with neon trim

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward a lit pagoda structure, passing by scattered pedestrians and observing the futuristic cityscape

notable_agents.action: woman walking across the plaza in the rain toward the right side
group of pedestrians standing near cyan light pillars in the distance

entered.detail: traditional Asian-inspired pavilion with neon edge lighting and dark roof
large glowing advertisements on the sides of futuristic buildings
illuminated caution barrier with alternating yellow lights
tall modern structures with glass facades and neon signage
additional cyan light pillar on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban plaza with the sky fully visible through the heavy rain. The camera moves toward a distinctive pagoda structure with neon lighting, passing yellow illuminated barriers. Futuristic buildings with holographic billboards line the left side, while scattered pedestrians move through the rainy plaza. The wet concrete reflects the myriad of neon lights from the surrounding architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit garden corridor into a vast, rain-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins within a narrow tunnel of dense vegetation and wet cobblestones, where cyan neon pillars cast reflections through a heavy downpour. As the foliage recedes, the environment shifts into a concrete transitional area where utility boxes replace the greenery and NPCs linger by the walls. The camera then ascends a wide concrete staircase, passing a descending pedestrian as the enclosed space gradually opens toward the sky. Finally, the scene expands into a wide urban plaza, moving past yellow illuminated barriers toward a neon pagoda and towering holographic billboards that reflect across the shimmering, wet pavement.
